name: corgi-desktop-pet
description: A cute pixel corgi desktop pet for macOS (Electron): draggable, wanders randomly, transparent click-through window.

scripts.pack: electron-packager . 多吉 --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=dist --overwrite --asar --app-bundle-id=com.simin.duoji --extend-info=build/extend.plist --ignore='^/像素狗狗动作帧' --ignore='^/dist' --ignore='^/build' --ignore='^/SPEC' --ignore='^/\.claude' --ignore='\.py$' --ignore='^/主图' --ignore='^/README' --ignore='_run' --ignore='^/config\.json$' --ignore='^/\.gitignore' --ignore='^/_' && cp build/icon.icns 'dist/多吉-darwin-arm64/多吉.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns' && touch 'dist/多吉-darwin-arm64/多吉.app'
